Terms & Conditions

Zavora shopping terms built on transparency.

By accessing or using the Zavora Fashion website, you agree to these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please discontinue using our services.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using this website, you agree to these terms and any policies referenced here.

2. Orders

All orders are subject to product availability, payment verification, and fraud prevention checks. Zavora Fashion reserves the right to cancel or refuse any order if suspicious activity is detected.

3. Pricing

Product prices are displayed in the selected currency and may change without prior notice. Taxes and shipping charges are calculated during checkout.

4. Payments

We accept secure payments through approved payment providers. Orders enter processing after successful payment authorization.

5. Shipping & Delivery

Estimated delivery times may vary due to courier delays, customs processing, weather, or other factors beyond our control.

6. Returns & Refunds

Returns are accepted according to our Return & Refund Policy. Returned products must be unused, unwashed, and include original tags and packaging.

7. Product Information

We strive for accurate descriptions, images, and pricing. Minor color or appearance variations may occur because of screen settings.

8. Intellectual Property

All website content, logos, images, graphics, text, designs, and branding are the property of Zavora Fashion and may not be copied without permission.

9. User Conduct

You agree not to misuse the website, interfere with operation, upload malicious content, or attempt unauthorized access.

10. Privacy

Your personal information is handled according to our Privacy Policy.

11. Limitation of Liability

Zavora Fashion shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages except where required by applicable law.

12. Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms & Conditions at any time. Changes become effective upon publication.

13. Contact Us

Email support@zavorafashion.com for questions about these terms.

"At Zavora Fashion, every purchase is built on transparency, trust, and a commitment to delivering a premium shopping experience."
Terms Summary
  • Secure payments
  • Protected checkout
  • Fast USA shipping
  • 7-day returns
  • Customer support
